faq_hero_h2: Investor Relations Platform FAQs for Listed Companies
faq_hero_sub: Everything you need to know about the Euroland IR platform, our investor relations software, pricing, and support.
faq_cta_p: Our IR specialists are happy to answer any questions about the platform and help you find the right solution for your company.
faq_q1: What is Euroland IR and who is it for?
faq_a1: Euroland IR is a comprehensive investor relations platform designed for publicly listed companies. It combines IR software tools, AI-powered solutions, and professional services to help IR teams communicate more effectively with investors, analysts, and other stakeholders.
faq_q2: How quickly can we get started?
faq_a2: Most clients are fully onboarded within 2–4 weeks. The timeline depends on the scope of the implementation. Our client success team manages the entire onboarding process and provides dedicated support throughout.
faq_q3: Do we need technical expertise to use the platform?
faq_a3: No technical expertise is required. The platform is designed to be used directly by IR teams without IT support. All tools are managed through an intuitive content management interface.
faq_q4: What IR tools are included in the platform?
faq_a4: The platform includes Share Graphs, Key Financial Figures, Analyst Coverage tracking, IR Calendar, Email Alerts, Push Notifications, Corporate Factsheet generator, Corporate Announcements management, and ESG reporting tools.
faq_q5: Can the tools be embedded in our existing IR platform?
faq_a5: Yes. All Euroland IR tools are available as embeddable widgets that can be integrated into any existing IR platform via a simple JavaScript snippet. They are fully responsive and inherit your brand colours and typography.
faq_q6: Does the platform support multiple languages?
faq_a6: Yes. The platform supports multi-language IR platforms and tools, with content available in English, German, French, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, and Japanese, among others.
faq_q7: Is there a mobile app for investors?
faq_a7: Yes. Euroland IR provides a branded mobile IR app for iOS and Android that gives investors, analysts, and stakeholders real-time access to stock data, financial reports, press releases, and IR calendar events.
faq_q8: How is data kept up to date?
faq_a8: Stock price data is updated in real time via direct exchange feeds. Financial data is updated automatically as companies publish results. IR Calendar events are managed directly by your IR team through the platform.
faq_a9: Euroland IR is priced on a subscription basis, with plans tailored to the size and complexity of your IR programme. Contact our team for a personalised quote.
faq_q10: Are there setup or implementation fees?
faq_a10: Setup fees vary depending on the scope of the implementation. For standard tool deployments, setup is included in the subscription. For custom IR platform builds, a one-time implementation fee applies.
faq_a11: We offer annual and multi-year subscription contracts. Multi-year agreements typically come with preferential pricing.
faq_a12: All data is stored in ISO 27001-certified data centres located within the European Union, in compliance with GDPR.
faq_a13: Yes. Euroland IR is fully GDPR compliant. We act as a data processor on behalf of our clients and have Data Processing Agreements in place with all clients.
faq_q14: What security certifications does Euroland IR hold?
faq_a14: Euroland IR maintains bank-grade security standards, including ISO 27001 certification, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and regular third-party penetration testing.
faq_q15: Can I control who has access to the platform?
faq_a15: Yes. The platform includes role-based access controls, allowing you to define granular permissions for different team members. Single sign-on via SAML 2.0 is also supported for enterprise clients.
faq_q16: What AI features does Euroland IR offer?
faq_a16: Euroland IR's AI suite includes: AI Disclosure Assistant, AI Earnings Summary, AI Translation, and AI Sentiment Analysis. All AI features are purpose-built for IR and trained on IR-specific language.
faq_q17: Is the AI output auditable and explainable?
faq_a17: Yes. Every AI output includes a full citation of the source documents and data used to generate it. IR teams can review, edit, and approve all AI-generated content before publication.
faq_q18: Does the AI use my company data to train its models?
faq_a18: No. Your company's data is never used to train shared AI models. All AI processing is performed in an isolated environment specific to your account.
faq_q19: Which regulatory frameworks does the AI Disclosure Assistant support?
faq_a19: The AI Disclosure Assistant supports EU MAR, the UK Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules, SEC Regulation FD, and the listing rules of major exchanges including Nasdaq, NYSE, London Stock Exchange, Euronext, and the Nordic exchanges.
faq_a20: All Euroland IR clients have access to a dedicated account manager and our 24/7 technical support helpdesk. Support is available via email, phone, and live chat.
faq_a21: Yes. All new clients receive a structured onboarding and training programme. Ongoing training is available via our online knowledge base, video tutorials, and live webinars.
faq_q22: How do I report a technical issue?
faq_a22: Technical issues can be reported via our helpdesk portal, by email, or by calling our support line. All issues are tracked and you will receive regular updates until resolution.
faq_q23: Does Euroland IR support CSRD reporting?
faq_a23: Yes. Euroland IR offers a dedicated CSRD Reporting Solution that helps listed companies present their CSRD and ESG disclosures in a structured, investor-friendly format. It is designed to make complex disclosure documents — including double materiality assessments and ESRS-aligned reporting — more accessible to investors, analysts, and ESG raters.
faq_a24: The Sustainability IAT (Interactive Analytical Tool) is a dynamic, fully managed sustainability presentation tool. It allows listed companies to present their sustainability KPIs, targets, commitments, and performance trends in an interactive, always-current format. Euroland IR handles all updates and maintenance on your behalf.
faq_q25: What is the difference between the CSRD Reporting Solution and the Sustainability IAT?
faq_a25: The CSRD Reporting Solution is designed for structured, formal disclosure communication — aligned to reporting cycles and focused on ESRS disclosures, double materiality, and key insights from your sustainability report. The Sustainability IAT is designed for ongoing stakeholder communication — a dynamic, interactive presentation of sustainability data that is updated continuously and managed entirely by Euroland IR. Many companies use both.
faq_q26: Can Euroland IR help with ESG investor communication?
faq_a26: Yes. Euroland IR provides tools and services specifically designed to improve how listed companies communicate sustainability and ESG information to investors, analysts, and ESG rating agencies. This includes structured disclosure presentation, dynamic data tools, and investor-facing sustainability pages.
faq_q27: What does Euroland IR include in an IR platform?
faq_a27: Euroland IR builds award-winning IR platforms that include share price and financial data feeds, regulatory news and announcements, investor calendar, financial reports library, corporate governance section, shareholder information, and contact and AGM tools. All sites are designed for investor confidence and built to best-practice IR standards.
faq_q28: Can we manage our IR platform content ourselves?
faq_a28: Yes. Euroland IR platforms are built on a content management system that gives your IR team full control over content updates. You can update news, reports, calendar events, and other content without technical assistance. Euroland IR also offers a fully managed service where our team handles all updates on your behalf.
faq_q29: Is the IR platform optimised for search engines?
faq_a29: Yes. All Euroland IR platforms are built with SEO best practices including structured heading hierarchy, semantic markup, clean URL structures, fast load times, and mobile responsiveness. We also advise on meta titles, meta descriptions, and schema markup to maximise search visibility.
faq_q30: Can the IR platform be integrated with other Euroland IR tools?
faq_a30: Yes. Euroland IR platforms are designed to integrate seamlessly with the full Euroland IR platform, including share price data feeds, investor alerts, IR calendar, financial report library, and sustainability tools. This gives investors a single, consistent destination for all IR information.
gloss_hero_sub: A comprehensive reference of financial and investor relations terms used by listed companies and capital markets professionals.
gloss_Acquisition: A purchase of all or part of a company to obtain ownership of its operating resources.
gloss_Analyst: Analysts assess financial market information to develop forecasts of future stock market developments.
gloss_Annual_financial_statements: Documents a company's financial results for the past fiscal year, including balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow statement.
gloss_Articles_of_incorporation: Contractual basis of a stock corporation stating the company name, headquarters, business purpose, and capital stock.
gloss_Asset_deal: Acquisition of a company by transferring individual assets rather than shares to the purchaser.
gloss_Authorised_capital: An amount designated to be converted into shares to increase the capital stock of a stock corporation.
gloss_Balance_sheet: A complete breakdown of a company's assets and liabilities as of a given date.
gloss_Bear_market: A market in which prices are declining, typically defined as a drop of 20% or more from a recent high.
gloss_Blue_chip: A large, well-established, and financially stable company with a long record of reliable performance.
gloss_Bond: A fixed-income instrument representing a loan made by an investor to a borrower.
gloss_Book_value: The net asset value of a company, calculated as total assets minus intangible assets and liabilities.
gloss_Bull_market: A financial market in which prices are rising or are expected to rise.
gloss_Capital_expenditure: Funds used by a company to acquire, upgrade, and maintain physical assets.
gloss_Capital_market: A financial market in which long-term debt or equity-backed securities are bought and sold.
gloss_Cash_flow: The net amount of cash and cash equivalents being transferred into and out of a business.
gloss_Corporate_governance: The system of rules, practices, and processes by which a company is directed and controlled.
gloss_Debt_ratio: A financial ratio indicating the percentage of a company's assets provided via debt.
gloss_Depreciation: The reduction in the value of an asset over time, due to wear and tear.
gloss_Dilution: A reduction in the ownership percentage of a share caused by the issuance of new shares.
gloss_Disclosure: The act of releasing all relevant information pertaining to a company that may influence an investment decision.
gloss_Dividend: A distribution of a portion of a company's earnings paid to shareholders.
gloss_Dividend_yield: A financial ratio showing how much a company pays out in dividends relative to its stock price.
gloss_EBIT: Earnings Before Interest and Taxes. A measure of a firm's profit excluding interest and income tax expenses.
gloss_EBITDA: Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortisation.
gloss_Earnings_per_share: The portion of a company's profit allocated to each outstanding share of common stock.
gloss_Equity: A combination of the funds raised by a company's owners to finance it, including share capital and retained earnings.
gloss_Fair_value: The price at which an asset would change hands between a willing buyer and a willing seller.
gloss_Financial_year: A one-year period used by companies and governments for financial reporting and budgeting.
gloss_Free_float: The portion of shares held by public investors as opposed to locked-in stock held by promoters or insiders.
gloss_Free_cash_flow: Cash a company generates after accounting for cash outflows to support operations and maintain capital assets.
gloss_GAAP: Generally Accepted Accounting Principles. A collection of accounting rules and standards for financial reporting.
gloss_Goodwill: An intangible asset arising when a buyer acquires a business at a premium over the fair market value of its net assets.
gloss_Gross_margin: A company's net sales revenue minus its cost of goods sold, expressed as a percentage.
gloss_Growth_stock: A share in a company anticipated to grow at a rate significantly above the market average.
gloss_IFRS: International Financial Reporting Standards. Accounting rules for the financial statements of public companies.
gloss_Initial_public_offering: The process by which a private company goes public by selling its stock to the general public.
gloss_Institutional_investor: A nonbank organisation that trades securities in large quantities and qualifies for preferential treatment.
gloss_Investor_relations: A strategic management responsibility integrating finance, communication, marketing and securities law compliance.
gloss_Key_performance_indicator: A quantifiable measure used to evaluate the success of an organisation in meeting performance objectives.
gloss_Leverage: The use of borrowed capital as a funding source to expand a firm's asset base and generate returns.
gloss_Liquidity: The degree to which an asset can be quickly bought or sold in the market without affecting its price.
gloss_Market_capitalisation: The total market value of a company's outstanding shares of stock.
gloss_Material_information: Any information that a reasonable investor would consider important in making an investment decision.
gloss_Net_asset_value: The value of an entity's assets minus the value of its liabilities.
gloss_Net_income: A company's total earnings calculated by subtracting total expenses from total revenues.
gloss_Operating_profit: The profit earned from a firm's normal core business operations.
gloss_P_E_ratio: Price-to-Earnings ratio. The ratio for valuing a company that measures its share price relative to per-share earnings.
gloss_Proxy_statement: A document providing shareholders with information necessary to make informed votes at shareholder meetings.
gloss_Quarterly_report: A report filed by public companies every three months providing unaudited financial statements.
gloss_Rating: An assessment of the creditworthiness of a borrower with respect to a particular debt or financial obligation.
gloss_Regulatory_filing: Documents that companies are required to submit to regulatory bodies such as the SEC or national stock exchanges.
gloss_Reserve_capital: Equity above and beyond a company's nominal liable capital.
gloss_Retained_earnings: Net profits kept within a business after dividends have been paid.
gloss_Return: The yield on capital employed, in percent.
gloss_Return_on_capital_employed: ROCE. Measures the return on capital employed in percent.
gloss_Return_on_equity: A measure of a company's profitability relative to shareholders' equity.
gloss_ROCE: Return on Capital Employed. Measures the return on capital employed in percent.
gloss_Shareholder: A person owning shares in a stock corporation.
gloss_Shareholder_value: A management concept that aims to maximize benefits to a company's stockholders.
gloss_Spot_rate: Prices fixed for securities that only have one price quoted per trading day.
gloss_Stakeholder_value: A management approach that aims to generate value for everyone affected by a company's policies.
gloss_Standard_and_Poors: Standard & Poor's is one of the best-known and most important rating agencies.
gloss_Statement_of_financial_position: A complete breakdown of a company's assets, equity and liabilities as of a given date.
gloss_Subscription: When a company is to be newly listed, potential investors can subscribe for shares once the issue price range has been set.
gloss_Syndicated_credit_facility: Credit line agreed with a group of banks, generally used for extensive financing requirements.
gloss_YTD: Year to date. Used in presentations of a fund's performance from the start of the current year.
gloss_CSRD: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive. EU legislation requiring large listed companies to disclose detailed information on environmental, social, and governance matters in accordance with the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS).
gloss_ESG: Environmental, Social, and Governance. A framework used by investors and companies to evaluate a company's sustainability practices and ethical impact. ESG factors are increasingly used in investment analysis and corporate reporting.
gloss_Double_materiality: A concept introduced under CSRD requiring companies to assess both financial materiality (how sustainability issues affect the company's financial performance) and impact materiality (how the company's activities affect people and the environment). Both perspectives must be disclosed.
gloss_ESRS: European Sustainability Reporting Standards. The mandatory reporting standards under CSRD, developed by EFRAG, covering environmental, social, and governance topics. Companies subject to CSRD must structure their sustainability disclosures in accordance with ESRS.
gloss_Sustainability_reporting: The practice of disclosing a company's environmental, social, and governance performance and impacts. Sustainability reporting may be voluntary or mandatory depending on jurisdiction and company size, and is increasingly aligned to standardised frameworks such as CSRD, GRI, or TCFD.
gloss_Non_financial_reporting: Disclosure of information relating to a company's environmental, social, and governance performance, as distinct from financial reporting. The term is being replaced in EU regulation by 'sustainability reporting' under CSRD.
gloss_Integrated_reporting: A reporting approach that combines financial and non-financial information to provide a holistic view of how a company creates value over time. Promoted by the International Integrated Reporting Council (IIRC).
gloss_Carbon_footprint: The total amount of greenhouse gas emissions caused directly and indirectly by an organisation, product, or individual, typically expressed in tonnes of CO2 equivalent.
gloss_Scope_1_emissions: Direct greenhouse gas emissions from sources owned or controlled by a company, such as fuel combustion in company-owned vehicles and facilities.
gloss_Scope_2_emissions: Indirect greenhouse gas emissions from the generation of purchased electricity, heat, or steam consumed by a company.
gloss_Scope_3_emissions: All other indirect greenhouse gas emissions in a company's value chain, including upstream and downstream activities such as supply chain, business travel, and product use by customers.
gloss_GRI: Global Reporting Initiative. An independent international organisation that provides the world's most widely used standards for sustainability reporting. GRI Standards help organisations understand and communicate their impacts on the economy, environment, and people.
gloss_TCFD: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures. A framework developed to improve and increase reporting of climate-related financial information, helping investors understand the financial risks and opportunities associated with climate change.
gloss_Impact_materiality: One of the two dimensions of double materiality under CSRD. Impact materiality assesses the actual or potential effects of a company's activities on people and the environment, regardless of whether those effects affect the company's financial performance.
gloss_Financial_materiality: One of the two dimensions of double materiality under CSRD. Financial materiality assesses how sustainability-related risks and opportunities affect a company's financial performance, position, and cash flows.
glossary_hero_sub: A comprehensive reference of financial and investor relations terms used by listed companies and capital markets professionals.
platform_hero_h2: Everything your IR programme needs. One platform.
platform_hero_sub: Euroland IR is a unified investor relations platform — combining financial data, AI, compliance tools, shareholder engagement, and investor-facing products in a single, fully managed solution for public companies.
platform_s1_h3: Real-time financial data, built for investor relations
platform_s1_body: Euroland IR sources share price data, key financials, analyst consensus, and ownership analytics directly from exchanges and regulatory feeds — and delivers them in real time across your IR platform, apps, and investor alerts. No manual updates. No data delays. No third-party integrations to manage.
platform_s1_video: See stock data tools in action
platform_s2_h3: Purpose-built AI that works with your IR content
platform_s2_body: Euroland IR's AI layer is trained on your company's IR documents — annual reports, press releases, earnings transcripts, and regulatory filings. Investors and analysts can ask questions in plain language and receive instant, cited answers. Your IR team can use the same AI to draft, review, and optimise communications faster than ever.
platform_s3_h3: Never miss a disclosure. Never keep investors waiting.
platform_s3_body: A fully managed financial calendar covering earnings dates, AGMs, capital markets days, dividend events, and roadshows — with automated email and push notification alerts that keep your investor base informed without adding to your team's workload.
platform_s4_h3: A best-practice IR platform, fully managed
platform_s4_body: Euroland IR builds and manages investor relations websites designed to meet the disclosure requirements of every major exchange — and the expectations of institutional investors, analysts, and ESG rating agencies. Responsive, accessible, multi-language, and always up to date.
platform_s5_h3: Your IR programme in every investor's pocket
platform_s5_body: Native iOS and Android investor relations apps that give your investors real-time access to financial data, news, events, and company documents — wherever they are. Fully branded, fully managed, and integrated with the rest of your Euroland IR platform.
platform_s6_h3: Structured ESG disclosure for the modern investor
platform_s6_body: Euroland IR's ESG solutions help listed companies present sustainability data clearly and credibly — aligned with CSRD, TCFD, GRI, and SASB frameworks. From structured ESG data pages to the Sustainability IAT, we make it easy to communicate your sustainability story to investors and rating agencies.
platform_why_h3: The IR platform built for IR
platform_why_sub: Most IR teams piece together tools from different vendors. Euroland IR is different — one platform, one team, one point of accountability.
platform_why_p1_desc: Not a generic CMS adapted for investor relations — a platform designed from the ground up for listed companies, with every feature shaped by 20+ years of IR expertise.
platform_why_p2_desc: Every module — data, AI, website, apps, alerts, ESG — works together out of the box. One contract, one support team, one platform that just works.
platform_why_p3_desc: Our team understands investor relations from the inside. Every implementation, every support interaction, and every product decision is informed by deep IR domain knowledge.
platform_why_p4_title: Proven at every market cap tier
platform_why_p4_desc: From smaller cap companies managing IR with a lean team, to large-cap operations with complex governance requirements — Euroland IR is trusted across 60+ markets worldwide.
platform_cta_h3: See the full platform in a 30-minute demo
platform_cta_sub: We'll walk through the modules relevant to your situation and show you what a best-practice IR programme looks like in practice.
stock_hero_h2: Real-time financial data for investor relations
stock_hero_sub: Live share prices, key financials, analyst consensus, and ownership analytics — delivered in real time across your IR platform, apps, and investor alerts.
stock_feat_sub: Our financial data tools are built specifically for investor relations — not adapted from generic financial platforms. Every feature is designed to meet the expectations of institutional investors, analysts, and retail shareholders.
stock_f1_desc: Real-time and intraday price data with bid/ask spreads, volume, and market cap — embedded directly in your IR platform.
stock_f2_desc: Interactive historical price charts with time-range controls, event markers, and peer comparison overlays.
stock_f3_desc: Aggregated analyst ratings, price targets, and earnings estimates — updated automatically from major research providers.
stock_f4_desc: Major shareholders, insider register, and institutional ownership trends — with movement alerts for significant changes.
stock_f5_desc: Total shareholder return calculator with dividend reinvestment — giving investors a clear picture of long-term performance.
stock_f6_desc: Income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow data — structured for investor relations and updated from regulatory filings.
stock_cta_h3: See financial data tools in action
stock_cta_sub: Book a 30-minute demo and we'll show you exactly how our financial data tools work within your IR programme.
analytics_hero_h2: Investor analytics and earnings reporting tools
analytics_hero_sub: Track investor behaviour, monitor shareholder movements, and manage your earnings communications — all in one platform.
analytics_feat_sub: From investor website analytics to earnings webcasts, our tools give IR teams the data they need to make informed decisions.
analytics_f1_desc: Track who visits your IR platform, what they read, and how long they engage — with investor-level insights where available.
analytics_f2_desc: Live and on-demand earnings webcasts with integrated Q&A, transcript generation, and replay hosting.
analytics_f3_desc: Monitor shareholder movements, identify new institutional investors, and track changes in your shareholder register.
analytics_f4_desc: Manage investor relationships, track meetings, and monitor engagement across your investor base.
analytics_cta_sub: Book a 30-minute demo and we'll show you how our analytics tools can support your IR programme.

apps_f5_desc: Regulatory filings and press releases delivered instantly to investors via push notification.
apps_f6_desc: Full multi-language support so investors worldwide can access your IR content in their preferred language.

invcomm_feat_sub: Our investor communications tools are designed to help IR teams communicate more effectively — from regulatory disclosures to investor events.

smallcap_hero_sub: Euroland IR gives smaller cap companies access to the same institutional-grade IR tools used by large-cap companies — at a price point that makes sense.
smallcap_feat_h3: IR tools designed for lean teams
smallcap_feat_sub: Smaller cap companies often manage IR with a small team or a single person. Our platform is designed to make that manageable — without compromising on quality.

about_values_global_reach_desc: IR is a global discipline. Our platform supports 10 languages and 40+ markets out of the box.

about_cta_text: Whether you're a listed company looking for a better IR platform, or a talented professional looking to join our team — we'd love to hear from you.

contactus_get_in_touch_with_our_team: Get in touch with our team
contactus_clients_relationship: We improve our clients' relationship with their investors — from startups to worldwide corporations.

contactus_security_governance: Security, governance, and workflow solutions for listed and pre-IPO companies.

home_testimonial_1_quote: Euroland.com's expertise, friendly service and fast delivery of the tools tailored to our needs made an impression on us. The tools are looking great and functioning very well also on mobile devices, which we think is an important point regarding communications with IR target groups.
home_testimonial_2_quote: Euroland's Financial Chart Tool was just the tool we needed to complement our website. Investors and analysts want to see historical financial development, and this tool provides that possibility. And as it is interactive, all the numbers pop up in the chart. It's a great tool.
home_testimonial_3_quote: Our analysts like the Interactive Analysis Tool — we have received very good feedback from them. Several investors have also sent us their appreciation on our new website. Communication with them is now faster and more accurate. Euroland does a great job updating our key information and presenting it in a very friendly and comprehensive way.
home_testimonial_4_quote: Thanks to Euroland, we were able to take our corporate website to the next level by providing comprehensive financial information and real-time market data in a highly user-friendly format. We are exceptionally pleased by the array of innovative tools that Euroland has developed, by their continued focus on enhancing their products and services, and by the professionalism and responsiveness of the support team.
home_testimonial_5_quote: I am very happy to recommend Euroland. The three most important criteria — quality, trustworthiness and price — were all at an excellent level, so it was quite easy for us to choose Euroland.

irservices_ir_strategy_desc: Expert investor relations strategy and consulting to help you build a compelling equity story, target the right investors, and communicate effectively with the market.
irservices_feature_annual_report_review: Annual report and results presentation review
irservices_annual_report_desc: End-to-end annual report production services — from content strategy and copywriting to design, print, and digital delivery. Aligned with CSRD, TCFD, and GRI frameworks.
irservices_feature_design_layout: Design and layout for print and digital
irservices_investor_targeting_desc: Data-driven investor targeting to identify and engage the right institutional investors for your equity story. Powered by Euroland IR's ownership analytics and market intelligence.
irservices_feature_investor_meeting_prep: Investor meeting preparation and briefing materials
irservices_digital_ir_desc: Digital-first investor communications that keep your investor base informed and engaged — from earnings webcasts and press releases to email alerts and social media.
irservices_feature_social_media_content: Social media content for investor audiences

irservices_investor_relations_services_f: Investor Relations Services for Listed Companies
irservices_hero_body: From IR platform design and strategy to annual report production and ESG reporting — Euroland IR provides the full range of investor relations services to support every aspect of your investor communications programme.
irservices_services_intro: Whether you need a complete IR programme or targeted support in a specific area, our team of investor relations specialists is here to help.
irservices_why_body: Euroland IR has been supporting listed companies with investor relations services since 1997. Our team combines deep IR expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver services that are both strategically sound and operationally efficient.
irservices_speak_with_our_ir_services_te: Speak with our IR Services team
irservices_speak_body: Our investor relations specialists are available to discuss your requirements and recommend the right combination of services for your programme.
irservices_ready_to_elevate_your_investo: Ready to elevate your investor relations programme?
irservices_cta_body: Join 1,400+ listed companies across 60+ exchanges who trust Euroland IR to support their investor communications.
irtools_share_graphs_desc: Real-time and historical price charts with peer comparison and event markers.

irtools_analyst_coverage_desc: Track analyst ratings, price targets, and consensus estimates.
irtools_advanced_ai_solutions_desc: Purpose-built AI delivers best-in-class data and text completion services.

irtools_corporate_announcements_desc: Centralized news and filings platform with advanced search and filtering.
irtools_ir_calendar_desc: Earnings dates, AGMs, roadshows, and investor events — always up to date.
irtools_email_alerts_desc: Automated investor notifications for price movements, news, and events.
irtools_push_notifications_desc: Reach investors directly with earnings alerts, press releases, and event reminders.

newsroom_newsletter_description: Monthly insights on best practice IR, regulatory updates, and technology trends — delivered to your inbox.
newsroom_press_contact_description: For press enquiries, interview requests, or media resources, please contact our communications team.
platform_why_card_1_desc: Not a generic CMS adapted for investor relations — a platform designed from the ground up for listed companies, with every feature shaped by 20+ years of IR expertise.
platform_why_card_2_desc: Every module — data, AI, website, apps, alerts, ESG — works together out of the box. One contract, one support team, one platform that just works.
platform_why_card_3_desc: Our team understands investor relations from the inside. Every implementation, every support interaction, and every product decision is informed by deep IR domain knowledge.
platform_why_card_4_title: Proven at every market cap tier
platform_why_card_4_desc: From small cap companies managing IR with a lean team, to large-cap operations with complex governance requirements — Euroland IR is trusted across 60+ markets worldwide.
platform_module_stock_title: Real-time financial data, built for investor relations
platform_module_stock_body: Euroland IR sources share price data, key financials, analyst consensus, and ownership analytics directly from exchanges and regulatory feeds — and delivers them in real time across your IR platform, apps, and investor alerts. No manual updates. No data delays. No third-party integrations to manage.
platform_module_stock_cta: See stock data tools in action
platform_module_ai_title: Purpose-built AI that works with your IR content
platform_module_ai_body: Euroland IR's AI layer is trained on your company's IR documents — annual reports, press releases, earnings transcripts, and regulatory filings. Investors and analysts can ask questions in plain language and receive instant, cited answers. Your IR team can use the same AI to draft, review, and optimise communications faster than ever.
platform_module_calendar_title: Never miss a disclosure. Never keep investors waiting.
platform_module_calendar_body: A fully managed financial calendar covering earnings dates, AGMs, capital markets days, dividend events, and roadshows — with automated email and push notification alerts that keep your investor base informed without adding to your team's workload.
platform_module_website_title: A best-practice IR platform, fully managed
platform_module_website_body: Euroland IR builds and manages investor relations websites designed to meet the disclosure requirements of every major exchange — and the expectations of institutional investors, analysts, and ESG rating agencies. Responsive, accessible, multi-language, and always up to date.
platform_module_apps_title: Your IR programme in every investor's pocket
platform_module_apps_body: Native iOS and Android investor relations apps that give your investors real-time access to financial data, news, events, and company documents — wherever they are. Fully branded, fully managed, and integrated with the rest of your Euroland IR platform.
platform_module_esg_title: Structured ESG disclosure for the modern investor
platform_module_esg_body: Euroland IR's ESG solutions help listed companies present sustainability data clearly and credibly — aligned with CSRD, TCFD, GRI, and SASB frameworks. From structured ESG data pages to the Sustainability IAT, we make it easy to communicate your sustainability story to investors and rating agencies.
platform_hero_heading: Everything your IR programme needs. One platform.
platform_hero_body: Euroland IR is a unified investor relations platform — combining financial data, AI, compliance tools, shareholder engagement, and investor-facing products in a single, fully managed solution for public companies.
platform_why_heading: The IR platform built for IR
platform_why_body: Most IR teams piece together tools from different vendors. Euroland IR is different — one platform, one team, one point of accountability.
platform_cta_band_heading: Ready to transform your investor relations?
platform_cta_band_body: Speak with our team to find the right solution for your company.
solutions_ai_ai_drafting_desc: Draft press releases, earnings commentary, and investor communications in seconds. Trained on IR-specific language and best practice.
solutions_ai_earnings_analysis_desc: Automatically analyse earnings results, identify key themes, and generate structured commentary for investor communications.
solutions_ai_investor_sentiment_desc: AI-powered analysis of investor questions, media coverage, and market sentiment to inform your IR strategy.
solutions_ai_disclosure_review_desc: AI review of draft disclosures for completeness, regulatory alignment, and consistency with previous communications.
solutions_ai_translation_localisation_de: AI-powered translation of IR content across 10 languages, with IR-specific terminology and tone.
solutions_ai_workflow_automation_desc: Automate repetitive IR tasks — from data collection to report generation — freeing your team for higher-value work.
solutions_ai_euroland_ai_description: Euroland AI is not a generic large language model applied to IR. It is trained on IR-specific data, workflows, and best practice — so the output is relevant, accurate, and ready to use.
solutions_ai_built_for_ir_not_adapted_fo: Built for IR, not adapted for it
solutions_ai_generic_ai_tools_require_si: Generic AI tools require significant prompting and editing to produce IR-quality output. Euroland AI is trained on thousands of real IR documents — earnings releases, annual reports, investor presentations, and regulatory filings — so it understands the language, structure, and expectations of professional investor communications.
solutions_ai_the_result_is_ai_output_tha: The result is AI output that is closer to publication-ready, with less editing required and fewer hallucinations or off-tone suggestions.
solutions_ai_earnings_releases_annual_re: Earnings releases, annual reports, investor presentations
solutions_ai_knows_what_can_and_cannot_b: Knows what can and cannot be said in different disclosure types
solutions_ai_learns_your_companys_tone_a: Learns your company's tone and style over time
solutions_ai_accesses_your_financial_dat: Accesses your financial data, consensus, and historical communications
solutions_ai_the_ai_drafting_tools_have_: The AI drafting tools have cut our disclosure preparation time in half. The quality of output is consistently high and aligned with best practice — it's become an essential part of our IR workflow.
solutions_ai_book_a_demo_to_see_how_ai_c: Book a demo to see how AI can transform your IR workflow — from drafting to analysis to automation.
solutions_esg_challenge_01_title: CSRD and ESG reports are hard to navigate
solutions_esg_challenge_01_desc: CSRD and ESG sustainability reports routinely run to 300–400 pages. Most investors — retail and institutional alike — cannot extract the ESG information they actually need without significant effort.
solutions_esg_challenge_02_title: Double materiality is difficult to communicate
solutions_esg_challenge_02_desc: Double materiality assessments are central to CSRD compliance, but presenting them in a way that is structured, accessible, and credible to investors and ESG raters remains a significant challenge.
solutions_esg_challenge_03_title: Sustainability data is static and fragmented
solutions_esg_challenge_03_desc: ESG commitments, KPIs, and performance data are often buried in annual reports or scattered across pages — with no dynamic, always-current view for investors or other stakeholders.
solutions_esg_challenge_04_desc: Investors, analysts, ESG raters, and media want to understand your sustainability position clearly — not just confirm that ESRS disclosure boxes have been ticked.
solutions_esg_card1_bullet_1: Structured presentation of CSRD and ESG disclosures
solutions_esg_card1_bullet_2: Clear communication of double materiality findings
solutions_esg_card1_bullet_3: Key insights surfaced — not just raw charts and tables
solutions_esg_card1_bullet_4: Easier navigation for retail and institutional investors
solutions_esg_card1_bullet_5: Reduces reliance on dense PDF sustainability reports
solutions_esg_card2_bullet_2: Clear stakeholder overview of sustainability commitments and performance
solutions_esg_card2_bullet_3: Fully managed and updated by Euroland IR
solutions_esg_card2_bullet_4: Downloadable outputs for investors and ESG analysts
solutions_esg_card2_bullet_5: Always current — not tied to annual CSRD reporting cycles
solutions_esg_hero_title: Structured ESG disclosure for the modern investor
solutions_esg_hero_subtitle: Euroland IR's ESG solutions help listed companies present sustainability data clearly and credibly — aligned with CSRD, TCFD, GRI, and SASB frameworks.
solutions_esg_heading_the_challenge: Sustainability disclosure is growing — but clarity isn't keeping pace
solutions_esg_heading_our_solutions: Two sustainability reporting products, two distinct roles
solutions_esg_card1_subtitle: For formal CSRD and ESG disclosure presentation
solutions_esg_card1_body: Most CSRD and ESG disclosures are published as dense, difficult-to-navigate documents. The CSRD Reporting Solution gives listed companies a structured, investor-friendly presentation of their sustainability disclosure — surfacing key insights, communicating double materiality assessments clearly, and making it easier for both retail and institutional investors to understand your ESRS-aligned sustainability position without reading hundreds of pages.
solutions_esg_card1_learn_more: Learn more about CSRD Reporting Solution →
solutions_esg_card2_subtitle: For interactive ESG data presentation and stakeholder engagement
solutions_esg_card2_body: Sustainability IAT is a dynamic, always-current presentation of your sustainability data and ESG commitments — fully managed by Euroland IR. It gives investors, ESG raters, and other stakeholders a structured, interactive view of your performance across environmental, social, and governance dimensions, with downloadable outputs and a clear overview of where you stand against your sustainability commitments.
sitemap_all_pages_across_sections_click_: All {count} pages across {sections} sections — click any link to preview.
stock_challenge_1_desc: IR platforms often rely on delayed or manually updated data feeds, creating discrepancies that erode investor confidence.
stock_challenge_2_desc: Managing separate providers for share price, ownership data, and financials creates integration complexity and data inconsistency.
stock_challenge_3_desc: Without a consolidated view of major shareholders and insider movements, IR teams lack the intelligence needed for effective engagement.
stock_tool_1_desc: Interactive historical share price charts with peer comparison, time-range controls, and event markers. The Share Graph Monitor provides real-time intraday tracking with customisable alerts.
stock_tool_2_desc: Live share price ticker for embedding across your IR platform, plus a full Share Price Look-Up tool allowing investors to retrieve historical closing prices for any date range.
stock_tool_3_desc: Display and compare multiple share classes side by side — essential for companies with dual-class structures or multiple listed instruments.
stock_tool_4_desc: An interactive tool that lets investors calculate the current value of a historical investment, including reinvested dividends — a powerful engagement tool for long-term shareholders.
stock_tool_5_desc: Visualise and communicate total shareholder return including dividend reinvestment over any time period, benchmarked against peers and indices.
stock_tool_6_desc: A live, structured view of your major shareholders and insider holdings — sourced from regulatory filings and updated automatically as new disclosures are made.
stock_tool_7_desc: A broad market context panel showing sector performance, index movements, and peer comparisons — giving investors the context they need to evaluate your company's position.
stock_hero_title: Real-time financial data for investor relations
stock_hero_subtitle: Live share prices, key financials, analyst consensus, and ownership analytics — delivered in real time across your IR platform, apps, and investor alerts.
stock_challenge_heading: IR data is only valuable when it's accurate, timely, and complete
stock_challenge_body: Most IR teams struggle with fragmented data sources, manual updates, and tools that weren't built for investor relations. Euroland IR solves this with a single, fully managed data layer.
stock_graph_heading: Interactive share price charts that tell your equity story
stock_graph_body: The Euroland Share Graph is one of the most widely deployed IR data tools in Europe. It delivers live and historical share price data with peer comparison, event markers, and time-range controls — all embedded seamlessly into your IR platform.
stock_suite_heading: Every data tool your IR programme needs
stock_suite_body: From live share price widgets to ownership analytics and market intelligence — all sourced, managed, and delivered by Euroland IR.
stock_cta_heading: See financial data tools in action
stock_cta_body: Book a personalised demo and see how Euroland IR's data tools can transform your investor relations website.
ae_challenge_1_desc: Financial results are published as static PDF documents, making it impossible for investors to interact with the data, compare periods, or build their own models in real time.
ae_challenge_2_desc: IR teams have no insight into which analysts are engaging with results, which pages are being read, or how investors are responding to earnings disclosures in real time.
ae_challenge_3_desc: Earnings preparation spans multiple tools — Excel models, presentation software, webcast platforms, and IR platforms — creating version control risks and last-minute errors.
ae_tool_1_desc: A live, interactive earnings dashboard that transforms your results announcement into a structured, navigable experience — with charts, KPIs, and segment breakdowns.
ae_tool_2_desc: Real-time consensus estimates from leading financial data providers, displayed alongside your actual results — giving investors instant context for performance assessment.
ae_tool_3_desc: An interactive financial model tool that allows analysts and investors to build and stress-test their own projections directly from your published financial data.
ae_tool_4_desc: Seamless integration with Euroland IR's webcast platform — embedding live and on-demand earnings calls directly within your results page for a unified investor experience.
ae_tool_5_desc: A structured, up-to-date directory of analyst coverage — including target prices, ratings, and report summaries — maintained automatically from your IR data layer.
ae_tool_6_desc: A searchable archive of all historical results, with side-by-side period comparisons, trend charts, and downloadable data tables for in-depth financial analysis.
ae_tool_7_desc: Detailed analytics on investor engagement with your results pages — page views, time on page, document downloads, and webcast attendance — delivered to your IR team.
ae_hero_title: Interactive earnings and analytics that investors trust
ae_hero_subtitle: Transform your results announcements into live, interactive experiences — with real-time consensus data, financial model tools, and engagement analytics for your IR team.
ae_challenge_heading: Earnings data is only valuable when it's interactive
ae_challenge_body: Static PDF results and disconnected webcast tools create friction for investors and blind spots for IR teams. Euroland IR Analytics & Earnings replaces the PDF with a live, structured, and trackable results experience.
ae_demo_heading: Results pages that analysts and investors actually use
ae_demo_body: Euroland IR transforms your earnings announcement into a structured, interactive results page — with live KPI dashboards, consensus comparison charts, segment breakdowns, and integrated webcast replay. Published automatically on results day, with no manual intervention required.
ae_suite_heading: Every analytics tool your IR programme needs
ae_suite_body: From interactive earnings dashboards to consensus trackers and engagement analytics — all integrated, automated, and delivered through your Euroland IR platform.
ae_cta_heading: See earnings analytics tools in action
ae_cta_body: Book a personalised demo and see how Euroland IR Analytics & Earnings can transform your results communications and investor engagement.
apps_challenge_1_desc: IR teams manage multiple disconnected channels — website, email, app, and alerts — with no unified layer to ensure consistent, real-time information delivery.
apps_challenge_2_desc: Generic app platforms cannot deliver the real-time share price, regulatory news, and ownership data that institutional and retail investors expect on mobile.
apps_challenge_3_desc: Without push notifications, personalised watchlists, and interactive tools, IR apps fail to drive the repeat engagement that builds long-term investor relationships.
apps_tool_1_desc: A fully branded investor relations app for iOS and Android, delivering live share price, financials, regulatory news, and company announcements directly to investors.
apps_tool_2_desc: Real-time push alerts for share price movements, earnings releases, dividend announcements, and regulatory filings — keeping investors informed the moment it matters.
apps_tool_3_desc: Personalised watchlist functionality allowing investors to track your company alongside peers, with custom price alerts and portfolio performance tracking.
apps_tool_4_desc: A structured, real-time feed of all regulatory announcements, press releases, and financial reports — formatted for mobile and searchable by category and date.
apps_tool_5_desc: Embedded share price charts with peer comparison, time-range controls, and event markers — the same data quality as the desktop Share Graph, optimised for mobile.
apps_tool_6_desc: A searchable, categorised library of all IR documents — annual reports, presentations, prospectuses, and filings — accessible offline and shareable from within the app.
apps_tool_7_desc: A live calendar of upcoming IR events — earnings calls, AGMs, capital markets days, and roadshows — with one-tap registration and calendar sync.
apps_hero_title: Branded investor apps that keep shareholders engaged
apps_hero_subtitle: Native iOS and Android apps, fully branded to your company — delivering live share data, regulatory news, and push notifications to your investors.
apps_challenge_heading: Investors expect a mobile-first IR experience
apps_challenge_body: Most IR programmes still rely on desktop-first websites and email newsletters. Euroland IR Apps bring your investor relations programme to where your shareholders are — on their phones.
apps_demo_heading: Your IR programme in the palm of every investor's hand
apps_demo_body: Euroland IR Apps are native iOS and Android applications, fully branded to your company identity. They deliver live share price data, financial results, regulatory announcements, and push notifications — all connected to your Euroland IR data layer and updated automatically.
apps_suite_heading: Every feature your IR app needs
apps_suite_body: From live share price charts to push notifications and document libraries — all built, hosted, and maintained by Euroland IR.
apps_cta_heading: See your branded IR app in action
apps_cta_body: Book a personalised demo and see how a branded Euroland IR App can transform your investor engagement programme.
comms_challenge_1_desc: Without a centralised communications platform, IR teams send inconsistent messages across email, website, and social channels — creating confusion and compliance risk.
comms_challenge_2_desc: Listed companies with international shareholder bases struggle to deliver consistent IR communications in multiple languages — limiting reach and investor engagement.
comms_challenge_3_desc: IR teams have no visibility into which investors received, opened, or acted on their communications — making it impossible to measure effectiveness or follow up strategically.
comms_tool_1_desc: Professionally designed, compliance-ready email campaigns for earnings releases, dividend announcements, and investor events — delivered directly to your shareholder database.
comms_tool_2_desc: Automated distribution of regulatory announcements to stock exchanges, news wires, and investor databases — ensuring simultaneous, compliant disclosure across all channels.
comms_tool_3_desc: Automated translation and localisation of all IR communications into 30+ languages — ensuring your investor messages reach international shareholders in their native language.
comms_tool_4_desc: A self-service investor alert system allowing shareholders to subscribe to specific announcement categories — share price alerts, results, dividends, and regulatory news.
comms_tool_5_desc: Structured invitation and registration workflows for AGMs, capital markets days, and investor roadshows — with automated reminders and attendance tracking.
comms_tool_6_desc: Detailed open rates, click-through rates, and engagement metrics for every investor communication — giving your IR team the data to optimise future outreach.
comms_tool_7_desc: A centralised, GDPR-compliant investor contact database — with segmentation tools, preference management, and automated list hygiene to keep your data accurate.
comms_hero_title: Compliant investor communications, delivered at scale
comms_hero_subtitle: Distribute regulatory announcements, earnings releases, and investor alerts across every channel — simultaneously, accurately, and in 30+ languages.
comms_challenge_heading: IR communications must be accurate, timely, and global
comms_challenge_body: Regulatory disclosure requirements demand simultaneous distribution. International investor bases demand multilingual content. Euroland IR Investor Communications delivers both — automatically, at scale, and with full audit trail.
comms_demo_heading: One platform for every investor communication channel
comms_demo_body: Euroland IR Investor Communications manages your entire outreach workflow — from regulatory announcement distribution to multilingual email campaigns and investor alert subscriptions. Every communication is tracked, archived, and available for compliance audit at any time.
comms_suite_heading: Every communications tool your IR programme needs
comms_suite_body: From regulatory distribution to multilingual email campaigns and investor alert subscriptions — all managed, tracked, and archived in one compliant platform.
comms_cta_heading: See investor communications tools in action
comms_cta_body: Book a personalised demo and see how Euroland IR Investor Communications can streamline your disclosure workflow and expand your global investor reach.
ipo_why_item_2: Regulatory compliance built in from day one
ipo_why_item_3: Fast setup — live before your listing date
ipo_hero_title: IR infrastructure for your IPO and beyond
ipo_hero_subtitle: From pre-IPO preparation to post-listing IR management, Euroland IR provides the tools and expertise to support your listing journey at every stage.
ipo_why_heading: Built for the demands of a listing
ipo_why_body_1: An IPO is one of the most demanding periods in a company's life. Your IR infrastructure needs to be ready from day one — professional, reliable, and scalable.
ipo_why_body_2: Euroland IR has supported hundreds of IPOs across major exchanges worldwide. Our team understands the regulatory requirements, the investor expectations, and the operational demands of a listing.
ipo_cta_body: Talk to our IPO specialists about how we can support your listing and build your IR infrastructure for the long term.
lc_card_1_challenge: Newly listed or very small companies needing a professional IR presence without the enterprise price tag.
lc_card_1_outcome: Institutional-quality IR infrastructure at an accessible entry-level price point.
lc_card_1_link: See the Micro Cap Companies page
lc_card_2_challenge: Lean team managing disclosures, investor queries, and communications with limited time and resources.
lc_card_2_outcome: A professional IR presence that's fast to set up, easy to manage, and scales with you.
lc_card_2_link: See the Small Cap Companies page
lc_card_3_challenge: More stakeholders, growing governance expectations, and increasing coordination complexity.
lc_card_3_outcome: Structured workflows and centralised tools that professionalise your IR operation.
lc_card_4_challenge: High communication volume, complex approval flows, and stricter compliance requirements.
lc_card_4_outcome: Enterprise-grade infrastructure with the governance controls and reliability you need.
lc_hero_title: IR solutions for every listed company
lc_hero_subtitle: Euroland IR gives listed companies the investor relations software, workflows, and managed services to communicate with shareholders professionally — regardless of team size, market cap, or regulatory complexity.
lc_how_heading: One platform, shaped to where you are
lc_how_body: IR needs differ significantly depending on company size, team structure, and market complexity. Rather than a one-size-fits-all approach, Euroland IR is designed to meet companies where they are — with the right depth of capability, workflow support, and service model for each stage of growth.
lc_cards_heading: Find the right fit for your company
lc_cta_heading: Find the right solution for your company
contact_hero_subtitle: Whether you have a question about the platform, want to book a demo, or need support — our team is here to help.
contact_form_success: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.

partners_cta_body: We work with data providers, technology vendors, and service firms to extend the value of the Euroland IR platform for listed companies worldwide.
